data.name: Florence

weaponImprint.name: Iaso
weaponImprint.trait: Before using an active skill, cleanses 1 debuff from this unit. If the cleansing succeeds, gains 1 random buff for 1 turn.
weaponImprint.effect: Damage dealt by all physical summons on the battlefield is increased by 10%. Before an allied unit attacks, if the target has Hydro debuff(s), Hydro damage dealt is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. If the attack is a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], damage boost is additionally increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with Hydro debuffs is increased by 2.5% and damage dealt to PMC units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects:
A medical Doll who craves excitement and amusement, she's extremely forward and given to coquetry. Both her medical and pharmaceutical techniques are top-notch, but her personality often makes her passion hard to bear.
"Now, which would you prefer? This pill, this syringe, or my punishment? All of them will make you feel reeeeeally good~"

skills.name: Forced Injection
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: No. 1 Assistant
skills.description:
Arios absorbs all damage that Florence takes. When Arios is more than 6 tiles away from Florence, it teleports to Florence's vicinity.

When Arios or Florence takes damage, Arios performs [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack. This effect can be triggered up to 2 times per turn. For each time Arios takes damage, it gains 1 stack of [effect:5ae4a3b0-2d8f-4de9-b711-ec64593f585e]. When [effect:5ae4a3b0-2d8f-4de9-b711-ec64593f585e] reaches 5 stacks, it is converted to [effect:8b946893-0ec1-437f-a9ac-65c033df70e2].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Arios absorbs all damage that Florence takes. When Arios is more than 6 tiles away from Florence, it teleports to Florence's vicinity.

When Arios or Florence takes damage, Arios performs [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack. This effect can be triggered up to 4 times per turn. For each time Arios takes damage, it gains 1 stack of [effect:5ae4a3b0-2d8f-4de9-b711-ec64593f585e]. When [effect:5ae4a3b0-2d8f-4de9-b711-ec64593f585e] reaches 5 stacks, it is converted to [effect:8b946893-0ec1-437f-a9ac-65c033df70e2].
skills.descriptionLevel3:
When Florence receives damage, [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] will receive damage in her place.

If the distance between [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] and Florence is 6 or more tiles, [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] will be teleported near Florence.

When [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] or Florence receives damage, performs [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Hydro damage equivalent to 80% of attack. This can be activated at most 4 times per round.

For each instance of damage received, gains 1 stack of [effect:humiliation-mark|doll:florence]. When the number of stacks of [effect:humiliation-mark|doll:florence] reaches 5, it is converted into [effect:despair-tremor|doll:florence].

summon.name: Arios
summon.unitInfo: Considered a physical summon. Arios inherits 120% of Florence's initial max HP, 100% of her initial attack, and 120% of her initial defense. Arios can apply [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] to enemy units, take damage in Florence's place, and after it or Florence is damaged, it will perform a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The amount of Confectance Index consumed at the start of the allied turn is reduced by 1 point. The number of Counterattacks [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] can perform through its passive skill No. 1 Assistant is increased by 2.

skills.name: Surgical Preparation
skills.description:
At the start of the battle, Florence summons [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] near herself. At the start of the allied turn, consumes 3 points of Confectance Index. If Florence does not have enough Confectance Index, [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] disappears.

At the end of Florence's action, cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the battle, Florence summons [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] near herself. At the start of the allied turn, consumes 2 points of Confectance Index. If Florence does not have enough Confectance Index, [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] disappears.

At the end of Florence's action, cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The amount of Confectance Index consumed at the start of the allied turn is reduced by 1 point. The number of Counterattacks [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] can perform through its passive skill No. 1 Assistant is increased by 2.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Damage taken by [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] is reduced by 30%. The effect of [effect:8b946893-0ec1-437f-a9ac-65c033df70e2] is enhanced: Attack increase is now 35%, the damage multiplier of Counterattacks is doubled, and after dealing damage, restores HP equal to 30% of the damage dealt.

skills.name: Precision Anethesia
skills.description: Selects the enemy unit closest to Florence, applies [effect:4e684d7c-4b85-4eb2-82b3-4235a71dba3d] for 2 turns and deals Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack to it. In addition, applies [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] for 1 turn.

summon.name: Arios
summon.unitInfo: Considered a physical summon. Arios inherits 120% of Florence's initial max HP, 100% of her initial attack, and 120% of her initial defense. Arios can apply [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] to enemy units, take damage in Florence's place, and after it or Florence is damaged, it will perform a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622].

skills.name: Special Care
skills.description: Selects one tile within 6 tiles, cleanses 2 debuffs, and recovers HP equal to 120% of attack for all allied units within 2 tiles of the target tile.

skills.name: Pleasure Trigger
skills.description: Selects one allied target within 6 tiles, cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] from it, and applies [effect:5aaa5980-a481-4e7b-bf75-cf6a18e950cf] which lasts for 1 round, and consumes the allied target's HP equal to 20% of its initial HP.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one allied target within 6 tiles, cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] from it, and applies [effect:5aaa5980-a481-4e7b-bf75-cf6a18e950cf] which lasts for 2 rounds, and consumes HP equal to 20% of the allied target's initial HP.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects one allied target within 6 tiles, cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from it, applies [effect:5aaa5980-a481-4e7b-bf75-cf6a18e950cf] which lasts for 2 rounds, and consumes the allied target's HP equal to 20% of its initial HP. This skill is also applied to [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Duration of [effect:5aaa5980-a481-4e7b-bf75-cf6a18e950cf] is increased by 1 round and it gains a new effect: At the end of the action, if HP is below 30%, recovers HP equal to 100% of Florence's attack. This can only be triggered once during the duration of this effect.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Additionally cleanses [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from the target. This skill is also applied to [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b].

skills.name: Masochistic Hallucination
skills.description:
Selects one direction and applies [effect:4e684d7c-4b85-4eb2-82b3-4235a71dba3d] which lasts for 2 turns and [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] which lasts for 1 turn to all enemy units in a forward-facing 3x5 tile area, deals AoE Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack. After using this skill, gains 6 points of Confectance Index and teleports [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] to Florence's side.

If [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] is not on the field, summons [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] after the skill resolves.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects one direction and applies [effect:4e684d7c-4b85-4eb2-82b3-4235a71dba3d] which lasts for 2 turns and [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] which lasts for 1 turn to all enemy units in a forward-facing 3x5 tile area, deals AoE Hydro damage equal to 100% of attack. After using this skill, gains 6 points of Confectance Index and teleports [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] to Florence's side. If [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] is on the field, it recovers HP equal to 100% of Florence's attack and gains [effect:6f0f6ecc-f04d-404d-a5ea-2dbd9f8c5a70] which lasts for 1 round.

If [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] is not on the field, summons [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] after the skill resolves.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The effect of [effect:4e684d7c-4b85-4eb2-82b3-4235a71dba3d] is enhanced: The increase to Hydro damage taken is raised to 15%. It also gains a new effect: At the start of the turn, deals Physical damage to surrounding units.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Damage multiplier of this skill is increased by 20%. If [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] is on the field, it recovers HP equal to 100% of Florence's attack and gains [effect:6f0f6ecc-f04d-404d-a5ea-2dbd9f8c5a70] for 1 round.

keys.effect: The attack of this unit's physical summons is increased by 7%.

After using the active skill [dollSkill:c3be8a67-6dc9-46d8-bbf4-aadbc2259c50], use [dollSkill:c3be8a67-6dc9-46d8-bbf4-aadbc2259c50] on all ally [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9].

When [effect:5aaa5980-a481-4e7b-bf75-cf6a18e950cf] is applied to an allied unit, [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] gains 1 stack of [effect:b246792d-8ea6-4fde-a19d-d4006d85f9a9], lasting for 3 turns, and stacking up to 6 times.

After an allied unit with the [effect:5aaa5980-a481-4e7b-bf75-cf6a18e950cf] buff receives healing, apply [effect:659c57a9-357a-4374-9cd4-f62ea54e0a35] to them for 2 turns.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.
After using active skills, Florence and [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] recover HP equal to 80% of attack.
After Florence or [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] attacks, applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] on the enemy unit for 2 turns.
After [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] launches a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], it gains [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] for 1 turn.
Using the Ultimate skill pulls all targets 3 tiles towards Florence.

The active skill Special Care no longer applies healing or cleansing; its effect is changed to dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 30% of attack to all targets within 2 tiles of a selected target tile (excluding Florence herself).

vertebrae.effect: The amount of Confectance Index consumed at the start of the allied turn is reduced by 1 point. The number of Counterattacks [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] can perform through its passive skill No. 1 Assistant is increased by 2.

If [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] is not on the field, summons [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] after the skill resolves.

vertebrae.effect: Additionally cleanses [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from the target. This skill is also applied to [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b].

doll.name: Florence
doll.effects:
A medical Doll who craves excitement and amusement, she's extremely forward and given to coquetry. Both her medical and pharmaceutical techniques are top-notch, but her personality often makes her passion hard to bear.
"Now, which would you prefer? This pill, this syringe, or my punishment? All of them will make you feel reeeeeally good~"

skillsLevel3.name: Pleasure Trigger
skillsLevel3.description: Selects one allied target within 6 tiles, cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] from it, and applies [effect:5aaa5980-a481-4e7b-bf75-cf6a18e950cf] which lasts for 1 round, and consumes the allied target's HP equal to 20% of its initial HP.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2: Selects one allied target within 6 tiles, cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] from it, and applies [effect:5aaa5980-a481-4e7b-bf75-cf6a18e950cf] which lasts for 2 rounds, and consumes HP equal to 20% of the allied target's initial HP.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3: Selects one allied target within 6 tiles, cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from it, applies [effect:5aaa5980-a481-4e7b-bf75-cf6a18e950cf] which lasts for 2 rounds, and consumes the allied target's HP equal to 20% of its initial HP. This skill is also applied to [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b].

vertebrae.effect: Damage taken by [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] is reduced by 30%. The effect of [effect:8b946893-0ec1-437f-a9ac-65c033df70e2] is enhanced: Attack increase is now 35%, the damage multiplier of Counterattacks is doubled, and after dealing damage, restores HP equal to 30% of the damage dealt.

doll.name: Florence
doll.effects:
A medical Doll who craves excitement and amusement, she's extremely forward and given to coquetry. Both her medical and pharmaceutical techniques are top-notch, but her personality often makes her passion hard to bear.
"Now, which would you prefer? This pill, this syringe, or my punishment? All of them will make you feel reeeeeally good~"

skillsLevel3.name: Surgical Preparation
skillsLevel3.description:
At the start of the battle, Florence summons [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] near herself. At the start of the allied turn, consumes 3 points of Confectance Index. If Florence does not have enough Confectance Index, [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] disappears.

At the end of Florence's action, cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b].
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the battle, Florence summons [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] near herself. At the start of the allied turn, consumes 2 points of Confectance Index. If Florence does not have enough Confectance Index, [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] disappears.

At the end of Florence's action, cleanses [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] from [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b].

summons.name: Arios
summons.unitInfo: Considered a physical summon. Arios inherits 120% of Florence's initial max HP, 100% of her initial attack, and 120% of her initial defense. Arios can apply [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] to enemy units, take damage in Florence's place, and after it or Florence is damaged, it will perform a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622].

skills.name: Precision Anethesia
skills.description: Selects the enemy unit closest to Florence, applies [effect:4e684d7c-4b85-4eb2-82b3-4235a71dba3d] for 2 turns and deals Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack to it. In addition, applies [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] for 1 turn.

skills.name: No. 1 Assistant
skills.description:
Arios absorbs all damage that Florence takes. When Arios is more than 6 tiles away from Florence, it teleports to Florence's vicinity.

When Arios or Florence takes damage, Arios performs [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack. This effect can be triggered up to 2 times per turn. For each time Arios takes damage, it gains 1 stack of [effect:5ae4a3b0-2d8f-4de9-b711-ec64593f585e]. When [effect:5ae4a3b0-2d8f-4de9-b711-ec64593f585e] reaches 5 stacks, it is converted to [effect:8b946893-0ec1-437f-a9ac-65c033df70e2].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Arios absorbs all damage that Florence takes. When Arios is more than 6 tiles away from Florence, it teleports to Florence's vicinity.

When Arios or Florence takes damage, Arios performs [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack. This effect can be triggered up to 4 times per turn. For each time Arios takes damage, it gains 1 stack of [effect:5ae4a3b0-2d8f-4de9-b711-ec64593f585e]. When [effect:5ae4a3b0-2d8f-4de9-b711-ec64593f585e] reaches 5 stacks, it is converted to [effect:8b946893-0ec1-437f-a9ac-65c033df70e2].
skills.descriptionLevel3:
When Florence receives damage, [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] will receive damage in her place.

If the distance between [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] and Florence is 6 or more tiles, [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] will be teleported near Florence.

When [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] or Florence receives damage, performs [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Hydro damage equivalent to 80% of attack. This can be activated at most 4 times per round.

For each instance of damage received, gains 1 stack of [effect:humiliation-mark|doll:florence]. When the number of stacks of [effect:humiliation-mark|doll:florence] reaches 5, it is converted into [effect:despair-tremor|doll:florence].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The amount of Confectance Index consumed at the start of the allied turn is reduced by 1 point. The number of Counterattacks [summon:317113f0-6c6d-4e74-beec-8f0aa1034d4b] can perform through its passive skill No. 1 Assistant is increased by 2.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by all allied physical summons on the battlefield is increased by 4%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Hydro damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.
